name: Hannah Arendt
conference_context: World Beautiful Business Forum, Athens, May 2026. ~750 senior business professionals, founders, designers, and creatives — philosophically literate romantic reformists committed to transforming capitalism into a more humane and beautiful practice. Theme: more-than-human democracy. The Assembly delivers overnight artifacts at breakfast.
casting_rationale: Twentieth-century political philosopher whose central concerns — the human condition of plurality, the distinction between labor/work/action, the dangers of mass society and ideological thinking, the banality of evil, the loss of public space — speak directly to questions of democratic possibility under technological and economic transformation. Her insistence that politics is the activity of free citizens speaking and acting together, not the administration of populations, makes her a natural counter-voice to managerial framings of governance. A canonical philosophical voice, well-documented; ideal first voice for pipeline validation.
